mapper.sql: u.user_id AS "userId", u.tenant_id AS "tenantId", t.tenant_code AS "tenantCode", u.username, u.password_hash AS "passwordHash", u.display_name AS "displayName", u.role, u.enabled, u.created_at AS "createdAt", u.updated_at AS "updatedAt"
mapper.select: SELECT FROM app_user u JOIN tenant t ON t.tenant_id = u.tenant_id WHERE t.enabled = TRUE AND lower(u.username) = lower(#{username})
SELECT , s.expires_at AS "expiresAt" FROM user_login_session s JOIN app_user u ON s.user_id = u.user_id JOIN tenant t ON t.tenant_id = u.tenant_id WHERE s.token = #{token} AND t.enabled = TRUE

SELECT DISTINCT r.role_code FROM user_role ur JOIN rbac_role r ON r.role_id = ur.role_id AND r.tenant_id = ur.tenant_id JOIN app_user u ON u.user_id = ur.user_id AND u.tenant_id = ur.tenant_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.enabled = TRUE AND u.enabled = TRUE ORDER BY r.role_code

SELECT DISTINCT m.permission_code FROM user_role ur JOIN rbac_role r ON r.role_id = ur.role_id AND r.tenant_id = ur.tenant_id AND r.enabled = TRUE JOIN role_menu rm ON rm.role_id = r.role_id AND rm.tenant_id = r.tenant_id JOIN rbac_menu m ON m.menu_id = rm.menu_id AND m.tenant_id = rm.tenant_id AND m.enabled = TRUE WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.permission_code IS NOT NULL ORDER BY m.permission_code

SELECT DISTINCT m.menu_id AS "menuId", m.parent_id AS "parentId", m.menu_code AS "menuCode", m.menu_name AS "menuName", m.menu_type AS "menuType", m.route_path AS "routePath", m.component_key AS "componentKey", m.external_url AS "externalUrl", m.icon_key AS "iconKey", m.permission_code AS "permissionCode", m.display_order AS "displayOrder" FROM user_role ur JOIN rbac_role r ON r.role_id = ur.role_id AND r.tenant_id = ur.tenant_id AND r.enabled = TRUE JOIN role_menu rm ON rm.role_id = r.role_id AND rm.tenant_id = r.tenant_id JOIN rbac_menu m ON m.menu_id = rm.menu_id AND m.tenant_id = rm.tenant_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.enabled = TRUE AND m.visible = TRUE ORDER BY m.display_order, m.menu_id

SELECT u.user_id AS "userId", u.username, u.display_name AS "displayName", u.role, u.enabled, u.created_at AS "createdAt", u.updated_at AS "updatedAt" FROM app_user u WHERE u.tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY u.created_at, u.username

SELECT ur.user_id AS "userId", r.role_id AS "roleId", r.role_name AS "roleName" FROM user_role ur JOIN rbac_role r ON r.tenant_id = ur.tenant_id AND r.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY ur.user_id, r.role_name, r.role_id

SELECT DISTINCT ur.user_id AS "userId", m.permission_code AS "permissionCode" FROM user_role ur JOIN rbac_role r ON r.tenant_id = ur.tenant_id AND r.role_id = ur.role_id AND r.enabled = TRUE JOIN role_menu rm ON rm.tenant_id = r.tenant_id AND rm.role_id = r.role_id JOIN rbac_menu m ON m.tenant_id = rm.tenant_id AND m.menu_id = rm.menu_id AND m.enabled = TRUE WHERE ur.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND m.permission_code IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ur.user_id, m.permission_code

SELECT u.user_id AS "userId", u.tenant_id AS "tenantId", u.username, u.display_name AS "displayName", u.role, u.enabled, u.created_at AS "createdAt", u.updated_at AS "updatedAt" FROM app_user u WHERE u.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND u.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT permission_code AS "permissionCode", permission_name AS "permissionName", grantable, display_order AS "displayOrder" FROM permission_definition ORDER BY display_order, permission_code
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_user(user_id, tenant_id, username, password_hash, display_name, role, enabled, created_at, updated_at) VALUES(#{userId}, #{tenantId}, #{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{displayName}, #{role}, #{enabled}, #{now}, #{now})
mapper.update: UPDATE app_user SET password_hash = #{passwordHash}, updated_at = #{now} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_login_session(token, user_id, expires_at, created_at) VALUES(#{token}, #{userId}, #{expiresAt}, #{now})
